title: 'Luther' Wins Grammy for Record of the Year
text: The song "Luther" by Kendrick Lamar featuring SZA has won the Grammy Award for Record of the Year. The track was announced as the winner at the 68th Grammy Awards ceremony held on February 1, 2026, at Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles. The brief announcement states: "Luther" by Kendrick Lamar with SZA wins Grammy Award for record of the year.
